title: AI Agent Economy ranking
source_note: Top 30 EVM chains by TVL from DeFiLlama snapshot 2026-03-07. Atlas publishes source-backed metrics when available and preserves the last valid snapshot otherwise.

modules.name: Registry
modules.rationale: Agent identity and discovery can already be launched against a credible chain-level registration surface.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, registry infrastructure is treated as available for the AI-agent benchmark.

modules.name: Payments
modules.rationale: Machine-to-machine settlement is already credible enough to support paid agent flows, recurring execution, and service monetization.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, payment rails are treated as available for the AI-agent benchmark.

modules.name: Indexing
modules.rationale: Queryable state and event coverage are strong enough to support discovery, monitoring, and orchestration for agent workflows.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, indexing infrastructure is treated as available for the AI-agent benchmark.

modules.name: Security
modules.rationale: Security foundations exist, but the chain still needs a clearer trust posture for production agent activity.
modules.evidence_note: Seeded demo assessment: For Arbitrum, security and trust controls are treated as partially available for the AI-agent benchmark.
